params.name: Maglev Iron Ball
params.description: After Big Guy Park founded the Ironball Sect, he decided to integrate modern technology with traditional martial arts to make a breakthrough. One of the most notable achievements is this levitating magnetic iron ball; it can greatly reduce the user's encumbrance and fatigue, and can still wreak havoc in a fight!
params.ss1:
Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle:
> Troop RUSH +1
